## Change

Describe the user-visible behavior and security boundary affected.

## Verification

List exact tests and platforms exercised.

## Security checklist

- [ ] No client-controlled value is treated as authoritative state.
- [ ] Protocol or ABI changes include compatibility analysis and negative tests.
- [ ] Tenant predicates, redaction, size limits, and failure behavior were reviewed.
- [ ] No credential, personal data, generated build output, or local-only file is included.
- [ ] Documentation and acceptance status are accurate; no unverified 1.0 claim is introduced.
